Acon..Back: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck. Crawling in the spine like insects.
Acon..Back, pain: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck.
Acon..Bladder: Inflammation of the bladder, with cutting, tearing pains. Burning pains with burning urine. Urine is hot, dark, colored red; red and clear, or bloody.
Acon..Chest: Aconite produces a very rapid inflammation of the viscera of the chest, of the pleura, of the lungs, of the mucous membrane lining the air passages. In pneumonia we have this dyspnoea, the suddenness with which it comes on. In these chest troubles there is much pain. Shooting, burning, tearing pains, and the patient is compelled to lie in a somewhat elevated position, on the back.
Acon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Aconite has such a sudden violent cardiac irritation, pulse fluttering, weak, full and bounding; sits up in bed, grasps the throat, wants everything thrown off. Sudden attacks of pain in the heart, with dyspnoea.
Acon..Chill: Vigorous persons get into a draft and get a chill that will bring on Aconite symptoms. The pulse in the highest form of the fever is full and bounding; strong, vigorous pulse. When the attack is first coming on and the awful anxiety and nerve tension are present the pulse is very small, but after the heart's action is well established, then the pulse becomes stronger.
Acon..Extremities: Trembling of the hands associated with these sudden acute attacks. Creeping pains in the fingers associated with these sudden acute inflammatory attacks. Rheumatic conditions of the joints. Those that come on as a first attack. Not old rheumatic and gouty attacks, but those that come on as acute rheumatism, those that come on from sudden exposure to cold, from long rides in a dry, cold wind.
Acon..Extremities, coldness: Cold as ice. Feet cold as ice. Hot palms. Hot hands and cold feet are sometimes present.
Acon..Extremities, paralysis: Numbness along the course of the nerves, from cold, from exposure. Numbness and tingling, along the course of the nerves, especially those that run close to the surface.
Acon..Generalities: Attacks come on suddenly from exposure to a dry, cold wind. It is suited to the complaints that come on suddenly from the very cold weather of winter, or from the intensely hot weather of summer. All these inflammatory conditions are attended with great excitement of the circulation, violent action of the heart, a tremendous turmoil of the brain, a violent shock, with intense fear.
Acon..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning is a symptom that runs all through the remedy, you will find it descriptive of all the pains. Burning in the head, burning along the course of nerves, burning in the spine, burning in fever, sometimes burning as if covered with pepper.
Acon..Genitalia female: The woman is a natural Aconite patient, with her sympathetic natural sensitiveness. Fear will often cause abortion, but when Aconite is given early enough it will check the abortion that comes from fear. Inflammation of the genitals in plethoric women.
Acon..Genitalia female, pain: We will have the stitching, burning, tearing pains of Aconite sometimes following fear or sudden emotion. Violent after-pains. Shooting, tearing after-pains, with febrile conditions.
Acon..Head: The headaches can hardly be described, they come with such violence. Tearing burning in the brain, in the scalp, attended with fear, with fever, with anguish; headache from taking cold, from suppressing catarrh in the nose. Violent headache over the eyes. Congestion of the brain, with congestive headache, with anxiety, with hot face.
Acon..Mind: The patient feels the violence of his sickness, for he is under great nervous irritation and excitement. Fear is depicted upon his countenance, and the heart's action is so overwhelming the first thing he thinks of is that he must die; this must mean death, which he fears. When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite.
Acon..Mind, irritability: There is moaning and irritability, anger, throwing things away, all attended with the violence and anxiety.
Acon..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite. Anxious restlessness covers nearly all of these things.
Acon..Mouth: Oh, what a comforting remedy it is for toothache. The violence of the toothache; again the same old story, from the dry, cold winds, plethoric individuals, with hollow teeth, pain intense, cutting, shooting pains in the teeth. Disturbances of taste, disordered stomach. Everything tastes bitter, except water; and, oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water.
Acon..Mouth, dryness: Aconite conditions are dry as a usual thing, or there is only a little watery discharge. Sensation of dryness of the whole chest, sensation of dryness in the larynx and throat.
Acon..Rectum: It may be a catarrhal condition of the lower portion of the colon, or a catarrhal condition of the rectum, when we will have a dysentery. In dysentery, that which is found in the commode is almost pure blood, blood and a little slime. It seems impossible for him to leave the commode.
Acon..Rectum, pain: The whole body is in a state of anguish, but the tenesmus and cramp, the urging to stool are simply terrible.
Acon..Respiration: Aconite is full of disturbances of respiration, dyspnoea from contraction of the smaller bronchial tubes, which we find resembles asthma. Breathing short, labored, anxious, quick. Sits up straight and can hardly breathe. Anguish with dyspnoea.
Acon..Sleep: The child is put to bed and rouses up from the first sleep, perhaps at 9 or 10 or 1 o'clock, grasps the throat, coughs violently, a croupy, choking cough, with hoarse bark. If he goes to sleep he will have spasm of the larynx, with dryness of the larynx. He goes to sleep and the larynx becomes dry and he wakes up and grasps his larynx; he thinks he is going to choke.
Acon..Sleep, restless: Great restlessness with fever. Crying and restlessness. Excessive restlessness.
Acon..Stomach: With the stomach symptoms what an anxious patient we have! The pains are dreadful. Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach. Vomiting and retching, tearing, as it were, the very inside out by the awful retching.
Acon..Stomach, pain: Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach.
Acon..Stomach, thirst: Oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water. It seems almost impossible for him to get water enough and it agrees well. Pours down great quantities of cold water.
